data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted at rest and in transit to ensure high security and privacy.
data.technical_spec: Use of TLS for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Advanced threat detection mechanisms to identify and mitigate potential security threats.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms and real-time monitoring for anomalous activities.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust DDoS mitigation strategies to protect against large-scale distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Use of global infrastructure and traffic analysis to disperse and handle volume spikes.

data.title: Authentication Protocols
data.description: Multi-factor authentication and advanced authentication protocols to secure user accounts.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 for secure access and 2-step verification for additional security layers.

data.title: Security Patch Management
data.description: Regular updates and patch management to protect against known vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Continuous integration and deployment practices to roll out security patches.
